mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clazz (name, begin_date, end_date, room, master_id, subject, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{beginDate}, #{endDate}, #{room}, #{masterId}, #{subject}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select:
SELECT c.*, e.name masterName FROM clazz c LEFT JOIN emp e ON c.master_id = e.id
AND c.name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{name},'%')
AND c.end_date BETWEEN #{begin} AND #{end}
ORDER BY c.update_time DESC
SELECT id, name, begin_date, end_date, room, master_id, subject, create_time, update_time FROM clazz WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, name, room, begin_date, end_date, master_id, subject, create_time, update_time FROM clazz
